## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` clean, `go vet ./...` clean, `go test ./...` green
- [ ] New interactions covered by a SimulationScreen e2e test
- [ ] Works in `--demo` mode
- [ ] Docs updated in this PR (README / docs/DESIGN.md / docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) if behavior changed
- [ ] No credentials in code, config examples, logs, or screenshots
